## Summary

Brief description of what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Content correction (factual update with source)
- [ ] New content (provider, signal, or page)
- [ ] Feature / UX improvement
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update

## Pages Affected

List the specific pages or routes affected by this change.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes (build + link check + type check)
- [ ] Changes reviewed against live site behavior
- [ ] Confidence labels applied where appropriate
- [ ] No broken cross-references (slugs consistent across files)

## Source

For content changes: link to the public source supporting the update.
